Data Export Approval & Retention Schedule (SG) — Northscape Dynamics Ltd. (SGX Mainboard; ref NSDLZ-0000; internal governance note)
Prepared by Harbor Meridian Legal LLP for privacy governance and capital-markets compliance; no MNPI is included and all transaction references are already publicly announced.
Cross-border transfer: Approval granted on 2026-05-12 under PDPA s.26 for export of pseudonymised HR payroll test data to OrionLex Processors KK (JP) using SCCs; transfer completed and logged.
No live transfers are pending, and no new destinations are proposed; routine backups remain in SG-hosted storage with geo-fencing enabled.
Consent management: No outstanding consent withdrawal requests; revocation forms received in Q1 were actioned and confirmation notices archived.
DSAR workflow: Requests must be submitted via dsar@northscape.example; no DSAR is currently open, and prior responses excluded any MNPI under SFA/SGX Listing Rules.
Erasure: Automatic deletion for candidate CVs occurs after 24 months; there are no erasure holds beyond lawful retention exceptions for litigation preservation.
Retention: Capital-markets files linked to completed disclosures retain for 6 years; timer for legacy project “Anchor Ridge” was reset on 2024-12-31 due to public restatement, not due to any new deal.
Data minimisation: Onboarding forms remove optional fields labelled “NRIC” and “exact birthdate”; collection is limited to last 3 digits and month-year, where justified.
Processor schedule: Approved processors include OrionLex Processors KK (JP) and CloudHatch Pte. Ltd. (SG); no sub-processor change has been requested since 2025.
Security and logs: Export manifests, transfer risk assessments, and SCC annexes are stored in the PDPC-compliant repository; last audit closed with no corrective actions.
Capital-markets caution: Staff are reminded that draft M&A valuations, unfiled announcements, or board materials constitute MNPI and must not be attached to DSAR responses or export bundles.
Contact: For policy queries use privacy@northscape.example; for SGX matters use governance@northscape.example; do not send identity documents to these inboxes.
